scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test:ci
scripts.ci: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix backend run test:ci && npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run build
